name: Accelerated Decomposition

spell.name: Accelerated Decomposition
spell.success: The target takes half damage and is your choice of clumsy 1, drained 1, or enfeebled 1 for 1 round.
spell.failure: The target takes full damage and is clumsy 1, drained 1, and enfeebled 1 for 1 round.
spell.critical_failure: The creature takes double damage and is clumsy 1, drained 1, and enfeebled 1 for 1 minute.

text: You speed the natural process of a creature’s decline and debilitation. As its body withers, the target takes 9d6 void damage and must attempt a Fortitude save.
